'''bashaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivacaftor|ivacaftor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivacaftor|ivacaftor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bashaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshæjæth|bæshæjæth]] || [[word:bæshæjæj|bæshæjæj]] || [[word:bæshæjæsh|bæshæjæsh]] || [[word:bæshæjæ|bæshæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashashajath|bashashajath]] || [[word:bashashajaj|bashashajaj]] || [[word:bashashajash|bashashajash]] || [[word:bashashaja|bashashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashajath|bashajath]] || [[word:bashajaj|bashajaj]] || [[word:bashajash|bashajash]] || [[word:bashaja|bashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashafjath|bashafjath]] || [[word:bashafjaj|bashafjaj]] || [[word:bashafjash|bashafjash]] || [[word:bashafjaf|bashafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashajatha|bashajatha]] || [[word:bashajaja|bashajaja]] || [[word:bashajasha|bashajasha]] || [[word:bashajaka|bashajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashajath|bashajath]] || [[word:bashajaj|bashajaj]] || [[word:bashajash|bashajash]] || [[word:bashaja|bashaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashajathal|bashajathal]] || [[word:bashajajal|bashajajal]] || [[word:bashajashal|bashajashal]] || [[word:bashajakal|bashajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashajathatha|bashajathatha]] || [[word:bashajajaja|bashajajaja]] || [[word:bashajashasha|bashajashasha]] || [[word:bashajaka|bashajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashajathan|bashajathan]] || [[word:bashajajan|bashajajan]] || [[word:bashajashan|bashajashan]] || [[word:bashajakan|bashajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashajathaoro|bashajathaoro]] || [[word:bashajajaoro|bashajajaoro]] || [[word:bashajashaoro|bashajashaoro]] || [[word:bashajakaoro|bashajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
